subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, within the sheltering grace of the Blessed Beauty, here in the lands of the West a breeze hath blown from over the rose-gardens of His bestowals
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شقیقتی العزیزه الحمد لله در ظل عنایت جمال مبارک در اقلیم فرنگ نسیمی از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement
